data.current_description: Retrieves a list of real-time foreign exchange rates.

data.reasoning: Current description lacks detail about pagination, filtering capabilities, and what data is returned. data.current_description: Initiates a foreign exchange conversion between wallets.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a foreign exchange conversion between wallets. Requires source and destination wallet IDs, currency pair, and amount. Applies current FX rates and any applicable fees. Returns the exchange transaction details including the converted amount, rate applied, and transaction ID. Funds are transferred between wallets upon successful completion.
data.reasoning: Original summary is a noun phrase lacking action orientation. Description is vague about inputs, outputs, and side effects. Enhanced summary uses action verb. data.current_description: Transfers funds between wallets within the same account.
data.description_suggestion: Transfers funds between wallets within the same account. Requires source wallet ID, destination wallet ID, and transfer amount. Supports optional reference or description for the transfer. Returns the transfer transaction details including transaction ID, timestamp, and final wallet balances. Funds are immediately deducted from source wallet and credited to destination wallet.
